## Agent Submission

<!-- Fill out the checklist below -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Folder created at `agents/<github-username>__<agent-name>/`
- [ ] `metadata.json` follows the schema
- [ ] `README.md` included with description and usage
- [ ] `icon.png` included (optional, 256x256 PNG)
- [ ] Agent repository is public
- [ ] Repository contains valid `agent.yaml`
- [ ] Repository contains `SOUL.md`
